judgeScores.justification: The organization demonstrates excellent taxonomic consistency with a clear file-type-first hierarchy (code/, documents/, spreadsheets/) followed by intuitive sub-categorization by language, department, year, or project. All 80 files were comprehensively reorganized with uniform snake_case naming and appropriate 2-3 level nesting (e.g., spreadsheets/finance/, documents/projects/project_alpha/). Minor improvements could include sub-organizing the 10 TypeScript files by architectural concern (components/, hooks/, utils/) rather than keeping them flat, and separating personal from professional photos within the 2024 folder.
